## Verification

- [ ] `cargo fmt --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets`
- [ ] `cargo test`

## Safety Checklist

- [ ] Fail-closed behavior preserved
- [ ] Persistence/transparency behavior reviewed
- [ ] No weakening of verification or auth checks
- [ ] Docs updated for interface changes
